summary: Added a branded app icon for vijdon_client_app and did a polish pass on the passenger MVP. Icon: generated a 1024x1024 yellow (#FFD600) icon.png and a matching transparent icon_foreground.png (bold black 'V', same mark already used in the app's own splash/login screens) via Pillow, wired up flutter_launcher_icons (Android adaptive icon + iOS) in pubspec.yaml, ran `dart run flutter_launcher_icons`, and rebuilt the debug APK to confirm it applied cleanly with no regressions. Bug fixes found during the polish review: (1) ClientRegisterSerializer only checked Client.phone_number for uniqueness, not User.username — since Client self-registration now creates a User row keyed by phone number, a phone already used by a Driver's User account (or vice versa, in DriverRegisterSerializer) would hit an unhandled IntegrityError and 500 instead of a clean validation message; fixed both serializers in taxi/serializers.py to also check User.objects.filter(username=value). (2) In client/home.html, cancelling an order called location.reload() immediately after showToast(), cutting the toast off before it could render — added a 1.2s setTimeout so the confirmation is actually visible before reload. Verified both fixes with a Django test-client run against in-memory sqlite: phone collision now returns a clean error instead of crashing, normal registration and the order create/cancel flow still work.
current_status: Passenger MVP is code-complete with a working branded icon and the two bugs found during review fixed. Same remaining items as before shipping to real users: apply migration 0043_client_user on the production Postgres DB (unreachable from this sandbox), build/sign a release APK via build_release.sh, on-device testing against the live backend, and the explicitly deferred phase (chat, SOS, push notifications, passenger-rates-driver).
